PROJ-101.title: Login button broken on iOS
PROJ-101.description: Users on iOS Safari cannot tap the login button. Appears clickable but nothing happens.

PROJ-102.title: Dashboard loads slowly
PROJ-102.description: Dashboard takes 8-12 seconds to load for users with more than 100 records.

PROJ-103.title: Email notifications not sending
PROJ-103.description: Password reset and welcome emails are not being delivered since the last deployment.
